texts.content:
From: Dr. Patel <patel@state.edu>
To: History 201 Students
Subject: Guest Lecture Tomorrow

This is a reminder that Dr. Amanda Torres will be our guest speaker in tomorrow's class. She is a leading scholar in post-war immigration policy. Please prepare at least two questions for the Q&A session. Attendance is mandatory.

Also, your essay outlines are due by Friday at 5 PM. Submit them through the course portal.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of Dr. Patel's email?
options: B. To introduce a guest speaker and announce a deadline
C. To assign a new research paper
D. To reschedule the Q&A session
questions.explanation: The email reminds students about the guest lecture and announces the essay outline deadline.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Dr. Torres's expertise?
options: A. She specializes in ancient European history
B. Her research focuses on immigration policy after war
C. She is a guest lecturer from another department
D. She has written a textbook for the course
questions.explanation: Dr. Patel describes her as 'a leading scholar in post-war immigration policy,' indicating her specialization.

texts.content:
Fairview Community Center – Spring Registration Now Open

Programs available:
• Youth Soccer (ages 6–14) – Saturdays, April 10 – June 5
• Adult Yoga (18+) – Tuesdays & Thursdays, 7:00 – 8:00 AM
• Senior Art Workshop (55+) – Wednesdays, 1:00 – 3:00 PM

Register online at fairviewcc.org or visit the front desk. Early bird discount ends March 20.

questions.stem: According to the webpage, which program is available on weekdays in the morning?
questions.explanation: Adult Yoga is on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 7:00–8:00 AM, which are weekday mornings.

questions.stem: What is the advantage of registering before March 20?
questions.explanation: 'Early bird discount' means a reduced price for those who register early.
